name: portrait_engraving_v1_p1
description: Pass 1: Convert historical portrait engravings to photorealistic portraits
intended_image_type: Historical portrait engravings, etchings, lithographs of people
pass_purpose: Translate engraving to photorealistic portrait while preserving facial features and expression

prompt_templates.positive: photorealistic portrait photograph, detailed facial features, realistic skin texture, natural lighting, professional portrait photography, high quality, expressive eyes, authentic appearance
prompt_templates.negative: drawing, sketch, engraving, etching, monochrome, black and white, illustration, cartoon, plastic skin, CGI, render, distorted features, malformed eyes, text, watermark

denoise.note: Lower denoise critical for facial feature preservation

expected_failure_modes: Facial features may distort if denoise > 0.35
Hair details may be lost or over-generated
notes: Portraits require highest fidelity. Lower denoise than other archetypes. ControlNet lineart critical for feature preservation.
